prose: Frontier-orbital energies for pyridine (C₅H₅N, 11 atoms) were computed at the DFT level using the B3LYP functional with the def2-TZVP basis set (tier 'standard'), in PySCF (RKS), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. The geometry was taken directly from the supplied .xyz file (single-point; not re-optimized at this level). The SCF converged in 10 cycles. HOMO (index 20) = −7.2525992 eV; LUMO (index 21) = −1.112786 eV; HOMO–LUMO gap = 6.1398131 eV (Koopmans-style orbital gap, not a TD-DFT excitation energy). Koopmans descriptors: vertical IP = 7.2526 eV, vertical EA = 1.1128 eV, electronegativity = 4.1827 eV, chemical hardness = 3.0699 eV. Integrity: trustworthy = true. No warnings reported by the engine.
